figures.caption: Table 3: Head-to-head comparison on a shared 500-tick environment. TC directly observes the overload flag ot (privileged, same run as the TC† row in Table 2); ATCPG infers load geometrically from future embeddings (blind). The +72.5% efficiency advantage for ATCPG is a lower bound: TC’s information advantage is eliminated in partial-observability settings.

Table 2: Efficiency scores η (18) for the full ATCPG model, ablated variants (averaged over 3 seeds), the fixed-interval baseline (averaged over 5 seeds), and TemporalController as a privileged upper bound. ∆ is the relative change versus the full model.

Table 4: Spatial ablation: ATCPG state-only vs. joint spatio-temporal embedding on a shared 500-tick trajectory. Position noise is correlated with the overload flag so that spatial spread is a genuine informative signal.
